title: SkillDefinition
description: A Velocity skill — a scoped, reusable prompt chain invoked on demand

description.description: One-line description of what this skill does and when to invoke it

category.description: Skill category for organization and discovery

chain_position.description: Position in the canonical skill chain

context_load.description: Files to read at skill invocation time (Layer 2 context loading)

path.description: Path relative to repo root or .velocity/

output.description: Where this skill writes its output

stack_variants.description: Stack-specific customisations applied by Skill Factory

preconditions.description: Skills or artifacts that must exist before this skill can run

next_skills.description: Suggested next skills after this one completes

fresh_context_window.description: This skill should run in a fresh context window (enforced by context_window_reset_between_slices guardrail)

skill_md_path.description: Path to the SKILL.md source template in the Velocity repo

status.description: Skill implementation status. draft=work in progress; complete=fully authored and usable; stable=battle-tested with RALPH annotations; deprecated=superseded, do not use

deprecated_by.description: ID of the skill that supersedes this one (required when status=deprecated)
